feed.title: Google Cloud: Cloud Router
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Cloud Router

entry.content: Cloud Router supports named sets in Preview for BGP route policies. Named sets are used to group together expressions of either communities or BGP prefixes, allowing them to be managed or referenced as a single entity. For more information, see BGP route policies overview.
entry.summary: Cloud Router now supports named sets for BGP route policies in preview. This feature allows you to group expressions of communities or BGP prefixes, managing them as single entities for easier policy management.
entry.title: Feature: Cloud Router Supports Named Sets for BGP Route Policies
